description.en: Run any AI model on Replicate by providing the model version and input parameters.
description.de: Beliebiges KI-Modell auf Replicate ausführen mit Modellversion und Eingabeparametern.

vars.API_TOKEN: env:REPLICATE_API_TOKEN|Get your API token from https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens

inputs.name: Model Version
inputs.bot: The full model version ID (sha256 hash). Find this on the model's page at replicate.com. Example: 'db21e45d3f7023abc2a46ee38a23973f6dce16bb082a930b0c49861f96d1e5bf' for stable-diffusion.

inputs.name: Input

description.en: JSON object of model input parameters.

inputs.bot: JSON object of input parameters specific to the model. Example for image gen: {"prompt": "a photo of a cat", "width": 1024, "height": 1024}
